records.snippet: Small public JSON fixture with posts, comments, and a profile object; useful for validating object shape, required fields, and safe text handling.
Sample post payload containing title and body text; suitable for testing title/content validation and sanitization.
Sample user profile payload with name, username, email, website, and nested fields; suitable for profile, username, email, and website validation cases.
Big List of Naughty Strings corpus for defensive QA and input-validation testing; includes unusual Unicode, long strings, and edge-case text inputs.
Base64-encoded Big List of Naughty Strings corpus; useful for testing decoding, sanitization, and edge-case handling in validation pipelines.
